opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't stop drinking water and peeing. Since my doctor told me I actually have Type 1 diabetes developing, I'm terrified I'm going into a coma.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It started a few hours ago tonight after a bit of a dietary slip-up, and I got scared my blood sugar was dangerous so I've been drinking heaps of water to flush it out — now I can't stop going to the toilet.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 6 hours ago this evening, after a dietary indiscretion
symptom_narrative.duration: 6 hours and I feel like it's not settling
symptom_narrative.character: constant thirst and needing to wee over and over; I've drunk more than 3 litres of water trying to flush the sugar out
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: I feel really wound up and panicky about it more than physically unwell
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: just the thirst and the weeing, nothing painful
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: started tonight and has kept going in a loop — the more I drink the more I wee
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing yet, I keep drinking because I'm scared
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: worrying about it seems to make me drink even more
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no throwing up, no tummy pain, no funny fruity smell on my breath, I'm not drowsy or confused and I'm breathing fine
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before — this is since my diabetes was reclassified
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm up and down to the toilet all night and too anxious to sleep, but I'm managing on my own

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: slow-developing adult diabetes that my doctor recently said is actually the autoimmune type — he mentioned Type 1 developing and antibodies
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: originally a while ago, recently reclassified
past_medical_history.how_managed: diet and tablets so far, not on insulin

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: very anxious about the diagnosis and the idea of eventually needing insulin injections

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported weight, not measured this encounter
